name: Vegetables with Coconut Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut all vegetables into thin 6cm strips.
2. Heat ghee and oil in a large pan.
3. Add garlic, chilli, mustard, and cumin seeds; cook, stirring for 1 minute.
4. Add the vegetables and cook, stirring occasionally until they are just tender.
5. Add coconut cream and yoghurt; stir until heated through.
